_SETUP: 1. In ComfyUI, build your workflow and click 'Save (API format)' — this gives you the raw JSON.
2. Paste the exported JSON here, replacing everything below this _SETUP key.
3. In the node that loads the input photo (LoadImage), change the 'image' value to exactly: "__INPUT_IMAGE__"
4. Optional: anywhere you want the guest name use "__GUEST_NAME__", guest code use "__GUEST_CODE__"
5. Set COMFY_URL=http://localhost:8188 in .env (or your ngrok URL if remote)
Done — the frontend will upload the captured photo and trigger your workflow automatically.
